race.comment: ELEGANT INDI (7) flew home to win impressively two back before sitting handy and missing out by 1.7L over this distance most recently. Suspect Pike will end up back in the run from the wide draw, the same tactics that saw her win impressively two back. Can go one better this time. SEINDEEL (2) flew home to just miss at Ascot last time out in a strong performance. He may be able to sit a touch closer than he did there from the draw today and the easier level this is. Rates highly on his latest performance and can make a statement. MANGIFERA (8) was rather plain on the Scarpside here last start when behind ELEGANT INDI. She was in good form prior however and today looks to set up much nicer from an inside draw. Should be handy in the run and can bounce back to her best. SOVEREIGN SALUTE (10) looks an exciting gelding on the rise and he creates plenty of interest here. STARATING (3) looks ready to go first-up on the back of a nice trial win recently.
